Internal Legal & Compliance Memo — Haneul Techworks Co., Ltd. (KR Issuer) — 31 May 2026
Under the Financial Investment Services and Capital Markets Act (FSCMA), the contemplated private placement and revised IR deck constitute material nonpublic information and are subject to blackout until formal disclosure.
Clustered identifiers: Mr. Jin-woo Ryu (IR Team Lead), DOB 1984-02-17 (age 42), employee ID EID-084217, email jinwoo.ryu@haneultechworks.fake.kr, office location Jaehyun-gu, Haneul-si.
Mr. Ryu’s company-issued laptop serial HNT-L-3371, device ID DEV-HNT-5512, IR-Portal session SESS-IR-0522-HNT, handshake token TS-KSIG-7721, and internal IP 172.19.8.44 are logged for audit; treat as linkable quasi-identifiers.
Resident-number token for payroll (masked): RRN-84-0217-02XX; do not store unmasked resident registration numbers in IR or HR files to comply with PIPA.
MNPI: Board is evaluating a block trade of a 9.5% stake in Sunryu Photonics Ltd. on the Saehae Exchange, with a potential anchor investor from Okjeon Capital Partners; none of these items are yet publicly disclosed.
Preliminary Q2 revenue (unaudited): KRW 128.4 billion with operating margin recovery; figures are embargoed and may only be shared upon public 공시.
Separated weak identifiers for scheduling only (no name): DOB 1976-06-03, plant unit P-7, device DVC-339, login time 23:11 KST, site “Haenam Works”; these details must not be combined with a resident-number in circulated emails.
Employment onboarding: Ms. Ye-rin Ko has accepted the Senior Materials Analyst role; office phone 070-3456-7890; general demographic noted as female in her 30s without additional linkable data.
Marketing cohort summary: five employees in their 20s from midland regions; generic demographics only and not identifying on their own.
IR contact channel: ir@haneultechworks.fake.kr; secure inquiries via IR-Desk ticket IR-19472 on the compliance portal.
Analyst engagement: Any selective briefing to sell-side or buy-side triggers disclosure obligations under FSCMA; coordinate with the Listing Review Department of the Jeongwon Stock Exchange prior to any materials release.
Event planning (tentative): Investor Day on 15 July 2026 at Cloud Harbor Conference Center, Haneul-si; ensure fair disclosure notice precedes any distribution of slide content.
Funding logistics: Designated proceeds account ACCT-HNT-002944 at Yulim Bank will be used to settle the convertible bond; banking instructions are confidential until the board resolution is formally disclosed.
Supervisory context: Finance Oversight Service (K-FOS) inquiry ref QN-2026-4421 regarding resident-number masking in employment contracts; response due within seven days.
Data minimisation: When circulating employment and IR drafts, include only masked resident-number suffix and role; avoid combining DOB, office location, and device identifiers in a single thread.
Benign note: Cafeteria menu rotations and shuttle hours are operational and may be freely shared; they do not implicate PIPA or FSCMA.
